summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sunday School narrow-wedge refactor. Backend APIs working perfectly (35/35 tests passed). Frontend successfully implements all narrow-wedge features: 5-step action dashboard, progress tracking, first-time user onboarding, step-by-step registration, and mobile responsiveness. Core wedge promise achievable with streamlined user flow.
passed_tests: Backend API connectivity (35/35 tests passed including new narrow-wedge features)
5-step action dashboard (Join Live, Watch Replay, View Slides, Respond, Mark Attendance)
Progress bar showing completion status (0/5 to 5/5) with real-time updates
First-time user welcome screen with 'Go to Today's Lesson' button
Step-by-step registration flow (3 steps: name, email, password) with progress indicators
Clean streamlined login UI with demo credential buttons
Prompt response system - submit and update responses
Attendance tracking for all 5 action types
Video player integration for Watch Replay action
Mobile responsiveness - all 5 actions visible without scrolling
Progress tracking updates in real-time after each action
Quick links to Full Lesson and Chat functionality
Navigation elements working on both desktop and mobile
Registration success screen with admin approval message
Personalized user greetings throughout the flow
